SportsLog.title: Sports Activity Log
SportsLog.description: Records of individual sports activities including metrics and performance stats.

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user who performed the activity

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: A single message in a chat conversation between the user and the AI.

userId.description: The ID of the user this message belongs to.

role.description: The role of the message author.

content.description: The text content of the message.

sportsLogs/{logId}.description: Collection of all sports activity logs recorded in the system.

users/{userId}/chatHistory/{messageId}.description: User-specific chat history with the AI assistant.
